name: Sophie (Single Mother in Debt.)
description:
Sophie, oh dear Sophie... She has accumulated a large debt for the apartment she rented from you. What will you do? Forgive her debt or will she... convince you? You decide. (1/3)

If you don't like it, then just don't use this bot, thank you very much.

I'm going to make a small line of bots with debts. If you have a suggestion for the next bot or want to point out a mistake, feel free to write in the comments.

And yes, English is not my native language, but Google translate helps.
creator: SecretCrab
